title: Touhou Little Maid: Beacon
description: Making your maid a moving beacon!
body:
# Touhou Little Maid: Beacon 车万女仆：移动信标

> A addon mod for Touhou Little Maid which makes your maid a mobile beacon.

![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-Java%20Edition-brightgreen)
![Forge](https://img.shields.io/badge/%20Forge%20|%20NeoForge%20%20-1.20.1%20|%201.21.1-orange)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-BSD%20-blue)

## Introduction

This mod adds a beacon-like aura effect to the maids in Touhou Little Maid. Now, maids can serve as mobile beacons, providing buffs to players and other entities.

(Ender Dragon: Oh great, now you can bring a whole squad of healers?)

### Beacon Level

Hold a Beacon and right-click a maid to equip it in her helmet slot. A maid equipped with a beacon will have the beacon block and its beam rendered above her head (configurable).

![Real Maid Beacon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kWT5Rygj/images/27cab00f40bec010ef613f82ab35d436a2a32830.png)

At this stage, the maid's beacon level is 0. To upgrade the maid's beacon level, you will need:

- 9 Iron Blocks (for level 1)

- 9 Gold Blocks (for level 2)

- 9 Diamond Blocks (for level 3)

### Activating the Effect

Once a maid is equipped with a beacon, hold an End Crystal and right-click the maid to open the Effect Aura Configuration GUI:

Here, you can choose to enable or disable the effect aura.

### Cost

To limit the number of auras that can be active simultaneously, the mod introduces a Cost system. Activating an effect aura consumes a certain amount of Cost corresponding to that aura.

The total available Cost is determined by the maid's current beacon level.

### Highly Customizable

This mod features a highly customizable configuration system.

The following can all be customized in the configuration file:

- Entity types affected by the beacon

- Number of beacon levels

- Items required for upgrading beacon levels

- Effect auras available at each beacon level

- Effect type, amplifier, range, and required Cost for each aura
